headline: Dollar General (DG) Back To School Push Puts Its Valuation Back In Focus
summary: Back to school promotions bring Dollar General (DG) into focus Dollar General (DG) is drawing fresh attention as it rolls out back to school promotions, including more than 70 classroom essentials priced at $1 or less, along with extra discounts and gift card sweepstakes for teachers. See our latest analysis for Dollar General. Against this backdrop of back to school activity, Dollar General’s recent 30 day share price return of 11.31% stands out within a year to date share price decline of...

headline: Dollar General (DG) Launches Back To School Campaign For Families And Teachers
summary: Dollar General launched a major back to school campaign, featuring low cost classroom essentials for families and educators. The company is offering special teacher promotions, including discounts and sweepstakes aimed at supporting classroom needs. This initiative coincides with the peak back to school shopping period, a key seasonal moment for NYSE:DG. Dollar General, trading on NYSE:DG, is putting extra focus on community support as the back to school rush gets underway. The stock closed...
